## Summary
What does this PR change?

## Why
What problem does it solve / why now?

## Changes
- [ ] Feature / fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore / maintenance
- [ ] Security / hardening

## Verification
- [ ] `pytest -q` (or relevant test command) passes
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] No secrets committed

## Notes
Anything reviewers should know (tradeoffs, follow-ups, screenshots).
